title: Copy recently-decoded bytes into the inflate sliding window
signature: pub fn updatewindow(strm: &mut InflateStream, end: &[u8], copy: usize) -> Result<(), InflateError>
notes: Faithful port of zlib's updatewindow. After a block is decoded, copy up to `copy` bytes from the tail of `end` into state.window at state.wnext, wrapping. Updates wnext and whave. If the window isn't yet allocated (state.window empty), allocate it to wsize = 1 << wbits first.

title: Emit the fixed Huffman code tables used by the static-block decoder
signature: pub fn buildtables() -> (alloc::vec::Vec<(u8, u8, u16)>, alloc::vec::Vec<(u8, u8, u16)>)
notes: Faithful port of zlib's fixedtables initialization. Returns (length-code table, distance-code table) matching RFC 1951 §3.2.6. Length codes 0-143 use 8 bits, 144-255 use 9 bits, 256-279 use 7 bits, 280-287 use 8 bits. Distance codes are all 5 bits. Each entry is (op, bits, value) matching zlib's code struct.

title: Install the fixed Huffman code tables into the inflate state
signature: pub fn inflate_fixed(strm: &mut InflateStream) -> Result<(), InflateError>
notes: Faithful port: calls buildtables() to produce the fixed code books (RFC 1951 §3.2.6) and installs them into strm.state.lencode/distcode with proper bit widths. After this the decoder reads static-block codes directly from these tables.
